data.title: Ancient Bitcoin Wallets Unlock 2 Billion After 14 Years
data.description:
Two mysterious Bitcoin wallets that had been inactive for 14 years transferred 20,000 BTC, worth over $2 billion, shaking up the crypto market.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/bitcoin/ancient-bitcoin-wallets-unlock-2-billion-after-14-years/

data.title: Ethereum and Beyond: EthCC Side Events Focus on Mainstream Adoption, Stablecoins and Beach Swag
data.description:
EthCC has showcased crypto’s breadth in Cannes. Robinhood’s 300-guest château event has added EU access to US stock tokens and new Ethereum and Solana staking, Stellar’s Stable House has examined stablecoin-based DeFi, and Binance has met Cannes’ mayor to promote crypto payments across the Riviera.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ethcc-side-events-mainstream-adoption-stablecoins/

data.title: Russia launches RUBx stablecoin and RT pay digital platform on tron blockchain
data.description:
4-7-2025 – Russia’s state-owned technology conglomerate Rostec announced today the launch of RUBx, a ruble-pegged stablecoin, and RT-Pay, a new digital payment platform, both set to debut later this year. Built on the Tron blockchain, RUBx will be backed 1:1 by the Russian ruble, aiming to facilitate secure and efficient transactions for businesses and individuals, [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/russia-launches-rubx-stablecoin-and-rt-pay-digital-platform-on-tron-blockchain/

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net inflow of 2,617 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net inflow of 36,439 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 2,617 BTC (US$283.23 million) today, of which BlackRock had a single-day inflow of 2,044 BTC (US$221.28 million), and the current total holdings reached 698,919 BTC (US$75.65 billion). 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net inflow of 36,439 ETH (US$92.19 million), of which BlackRock had a single-day inflow of 32,987 ETH (US$83.46 million), and the current total holdings reached 1,806,099 ETH (US$4.57 billion).

data.title: Mac House Expands into Bitcoin Mining with Zero Field Partnership
data.description: According to Odaily, Japanese clothing chain Mac House has announced a comprehensive partnership with cryptocurrency mining company Zero Field to enter the Bitcoin mining sector. This move follows their June announcement of a 1.7 billion yen (approximately $12 million) Bitcoin procurement plan. Under the agreement, Mac House will add mining operations to its existing 'buy-and-hold' strategy. The two companies will discuss specific operational plans and may consider expanding into areas such as NFTs in the future.

data.title: Lucky solo Bitcoin miner scores big reward of ‎3.173 BTC worth $350,000
data.description:
A solo Bitcoin miner won the full block reward of ‎3. 173 BTC using a small-scale mining rig with 2. 3 petahash per seconds (PH/s).
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/lucky-solo-bitcoin-miner-3-173-btc/

data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum (ETH) has recently dropped below the $2500 mark. As of now, it is trading at $2499.91 per coin, reflecting a daily decrease of 2.74%.

data.title: Bitrue Joins the Tokenized Stock Trend With New Trading Feature
data.description:
TL;DR Bitrue has introduced tokenized stock trading through its new feature, “Bitrue Alpha”, in partnership with Backed Finance’s xStocks. The platform allows users outside restricted regions to trade blockchain-based tokens representing U. S. equities
source: https://crypto-economy.com/bitrue-joins-the-tokenized-stock-trend-with-new-trading-feature/

data.title: Chainlink Whales Stack 85M LINK Amid Retail Cooling, Will Price Catch Up?
data.description:
Chainlink whales currently possess 85 million LINK tokens due to weak retail demand. Exchange outflows are 100,000 LINK per week on average, indicating steady institutional demand. Despite significant buildups, LINK price action continues to stay in the $12-$15 ranges. Technicians closely monitor significant resistance levels for breakouts to higher price levels
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/04/chainlink-whales-stack-85m-link-amid-retail-cooling-will-price-catch-up/

data.description:
Bitcoin just saw crazy 23,575% liquidation imbalance, and it might be because billion-dollar ghost wallets from 2010 suddenly came back to life
source: https://u.today/bitcoin-skyrockets-23575-in-one-hour-in-abnormal-liquidation-imbalance

data.title: Ancient Bitcoin Whale's Identity Questioned After Large Transfer
data.description: According to Odaily, an analysis by ai_9684xtpa suggests that the recent transfer of over 80,000 BTC by an ancient whale may not be linked to the entity known as 'Kao Mao.' Reports indicate that Kao Mao began manufacturing mining machines in 2012, and there have been BTC transfer activities from their known addresses since November of last year.

data.title: Japanese clothing chain Mac House announces launch of Bitcoin mining business
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Japanese clothing chain Mac House announced a comprehensive cooperation with crypto mining company Zero Field to enter the field of Bitcoin mining. This is another major layout after it announced a 1.7 billion yen (about 12 million US dollars) Bitcoin procurement plan in June. According to the agreement, Mac House will add mining business to the original "buy-hold" strategy. In the future, the two parties will negotiate specific operating plans and consider expanding into areas such as NFT. (CoinDesk Japan)

data.title: Ondo Finance to acquire US-regulated broker Oasis Pro for tokenized securities expansion
data.description:
The purchase hands Ondo the regulatory approvals it needs to list and settle tokenized U. S. stocks and bonds in the American market.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/361120/ondo-finance-to-acquire-us-regulated-broker-oasis-pro-for-tokenized-securities-expansion?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: South African NFT trading platform Momint shuts down due to market pressure
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News South African NFT trading platform Momint recently announced that it would cease operations, mainly due to rising operating costs, weak user growth and a severe financing environment. The platform was founded in 2021 and attracted attention due to multiple high-value NFT sales. It received $2.1 million in seed round financing in its early days. As of mid-2024, the platform has processed more than 400,000 transactions, attracted 53,000 users, and facilitated nearly $2 million in transactions. However, due to insufficient liquidity, regulatory pressure and user scale bottlenecks, it was finally decided to close. (News.bitcoin)

data.title: BTC, ETH Options Expiry Shows Stable Market Amid Tokenized Stocks Focus
data.description: According to Odaily, Greeks.live macro researcher Adam shared insights on the X platform regarding the options expiry data for July 4. The data revealed that 28,000 BTC options expired with a Put Call Ratio of 1.07, a maximum pain point of $106,000, and a nominal value of $3 billion. Additionally, 237,000 ETH options expired with a Put Call Ratio of 1.25, a maximum pain point of $2,500, and a nominal value of $600 million.Today marks the first expiry day following the quarterly settlement, with the market remaining relatively stable. Recent attention has shifted towards the tokenization of U.S. stocks, diverting focus from the crypto market. Despite BTC reaching new highs, market sentiment has not been significantly influenced.Analyzing the main options data, BTC's implied volatility (IV) continues to hover at low levels, with short to medium-term IV below 35%. Meanwhile, ETH's IV has slightly decreased, falling below 60%. The space for cross-currency volatility strategies remains available.

data.title: Analysis: The ancient whale that transferred more than 80,000 BTC today may not be FC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to ai_9684xtpa’s analysis, the ancient whale that transferred more than 80,000 BTC today may not be FriedCat. It is reported that FriedCat only started making mining machines in 2012, and there were BTC transfer dynamics in its public BTC address in November last year.
